log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 12 (d20:12 + 0)
Naga — Iron Concentration: 6 (d20:4 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: 51/67
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: 32/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: 21/67
⚡ Naga — Iron Concentration casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:18 total 28 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Naga — Iron Concentration's turn ---
Naga — Iron Concentration casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Naga — Iron Concentration casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Naga — Iron Concentration for 6. HP: 27/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Naga — Iron Concentration's turn ---
Naga — Iron Concentration casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 8 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Naga — Iron Concentration casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Naga — Iron Concentration for 5. HP: 32/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: 14/67
→ Concentration save: [20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Naga — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
